description_long: This sports car features a futuristic, aerodynamic design with a low-slung body and pronounced wheel arches. The exterior is predominantly white and yellow with black accents, giving it a striking, high-contrast appearance. The car has a sleek, elongated hood and a compact rear, with large, exposed wheels that suggest high performance. The cockpit area is streamlined and appears to be enclosed with a dark, possibly tinted canopy. Visible details include angular paneling, vent-like structures, and blue highlights on the sides. The overall look is aggressive and modern, suitable for high-speed urban driving.
description: A futuristic, low-profile sports car with a white, yellow, and black color scheme, large exposed wheels, and a sleek, aerodynamic body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, angular nose, prominent wheel arches, and the aggressive stance of the car.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated hood, exposed wheels, and the streamlined, low cockpit area.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the compact back end, rear lights, and the continuation of the yellow and white color scheme.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same aerodynamic lines, wheel design, and vent details.
attribute_wheel_design: solid disc wheels with a central hub and no visible spokes
